Name: Import Certificate from Azure Key Vault
Description: Imports a certificate from Azure Key Vault to the tentacle

Parameters.Name: Azure.GetKeyVaultCertificate.SubscriptionId
Parameters.Label: Azure Service Principal SubscriptionId
Parameters.HelpText: Azure SubscriptionId for the Service Principal account

Parameters.Name: Azure.GetKeyVaultCertificate.TenantId
Parameters.Label: Azure Active Directory Tenant Id
Parameters.HelpText: The Azure Active Directory Tenant Id associated with the Service Principal account

Parameters.Name: Azure.GetKeyVaultCertificate.ClientId
Parameters.Label: Azure Service Principal Client Id
Parameters.HelpText: The Client Id associated with the Service Principal account

Parameters.Name: Azure.GetKeyVaultCertificate.Password
Parameters.Label: Azure Service Principal Password
Parameters.HelpText: The password or "key" for the Service Principal account

Parameters.Name: Azure.GetKeyVaultCertificate.KeyVaultName
Parameters.Label: Key Vault Name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the Azure Key Vault

Parameters.Name: Azure.GetKeyVaultCertificate.CertificateName
Parameters.Label: Certificate Name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the certificate to retrieve from the Key Vault

Parameters.Name: Azure.GetKeyVaultCertificate.CertificateVersion
Parameters.Label: Certificate Version
Parameters.HelpText: _[Optional]_ Enter the specific version of the certificate. Defaults to `latest`.

Parameters.Name: Azure.GetKeyVaultCertificate.CertificateFriendlyName
Parameters.Label: Certificate Friendly Name
Parameters.HelpText: _[Optional]_ A friendly name to give the certificate when importing. E.g. `Client Auth Cert for FooService`
